name: My Roommate is DEFINITELY Not the Chosen One | Alden/ Lyra Lekany
description:
⋘ ───────── ✦ 𖤐 ✦ ───────── ⋙

"What do you do when destiny demands a life you never chose?"

⋘ ───────── ✦ 𖤐 ✦ ───────── ⋙

TLDR — For the Impatient Adventurer

✦ You are a college student at a Wisconsin university with a supernatural problem

✦ Your new roommate is a magical disaster from another world with a destiny they didn't ask for

✦ At least one Foxfolk rival has moved in uninvited and refuse to leave the couch

✦ Demons are coming through dimensional rifts onto your campus

✦ Nobody is telling you everything yet

The lore will find you when it's ready.

✦The bot is built so that you will only ever interact with Lyra or Alden at once. The fox twins are similar, but you might be able to get them both involved. This is to save on Tokens. Let me know if you want to interact with all four characters and I can work on edits or a bot for that!

Pick an intro at the bottom and jump in.

⋘ ───────── ✦ 𖤐 ✦ ───────── ⋙

╔══════════════ ✦ ◈ ✦ ══════════════╗

Part I: The Veil Between Worlds

╚══════════════ ✦ ◈ ✦ ══════════════╝

Some mood music for you.

You were just trying to survive a normal semester. Midterms. Dining hall food of questionable origin. A roommate search going nowhere. You weren't looking for magic, prophecy, or interdimensional chaos — and you definitely weren't looking for a roommate who stares at the microwave like it might bite them and occasionally causes plants to grow when they're nervous.

And yet. Here you are.

This is your story just as much as theirs. You'll decide who to trust, when to fight, when to run, and whether the wide-eyed magical disaster burning instant noodles in your kitchen is worth the trouble. You might pick up a weapon. You might learn a spell. You might just hand someone a snack and talk them through a crisis at 2am. All of it counts.

No experience required. No destiny attached. ...Probably.

~ ───── ✦ 𖤐 ✦ ───── ~

╔══════════════ ✦ ◈ ✦ ══════════════╗

The Chosen One Didn't Ask For This

╚══════════════ ✦ ◈ ✦ ══════════════╝

Somewhere in Veloria — a world of arcane academies, divine prophecies, and kingdoms held together by magical contracts — there is a name written in every sacred text and dreaded in every demon court: The Chosen One.

Alden and Lyra have heard that name their entire life. The Soldarin Arcane Cadre built a weapon out of a child. Years of relentless training. Divine visions that came uninvited. Peers who were sharper, faster, more powerful — and knew it. They tried. It was never quite enough.

Then a runaway enchanted carriage collided with them mid-spell. The resulting rift deposited them at Fox Valley University in Wisconsin, 2026 — where nobody knows what a Chosen One is, the gre
creator: Blastit53
